Prediction Contest

Call the winners. Climb the board.

Before each game day, pick who takes every field. We score it against the real results and crown a champion every month.

Around the League

Blackboard

Community Night · Tuesday, July 7

Free scoop at Village Scoop Shack

Thanks to the generosity of an anonymous donor from the Jupiter Senior Softball League, all JSSA members and their families are invited to enjoy a free scoop of ice cream on Tuesday, July 7 at Village Scoop Shack. It's part of their ongoing Tunnel to Towers Tuesday — 10% of all sales support military members and first responders across the country.

Visit Village Scoop Shack →

— John & Toni Cariero

Pickup Games · Mon · Wed · Fri

Sign up for the legendary pickup games

Sign up for the JSSA's Monday, Wednesday, and Friday pickup games. The deadline is 3 PM the day before each game day.

Sign up now →
Thank You

Thank you, Paul Storch

For four years of dedicated service to the JSSA. We're grateful for everything you've given this league.

About the JSSA

More than a game

The JSSA plays softball in Jupiter, Florida three days a week, every week throughout the year. We play hard, we play fair, and we build a brotherhood that goes well beyond the field. All players 55 and over are welcome.

Where We Play
Jupiter Community Park
3377 Church St, Jupiter, FL 33458
Game Days
Monday, Wednesday & Friday
Membership Info

John Cariero · 732-672-7491
